li.label: pluviophile
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] loves the rain. [PAWN_pronoun] gets a mood bonus when it's pouring outside, especially if [PAWN_pronoun] they are outside in it.

li.label: bipolar
li.description: NAME experiences extreme emotional states, swinging from periods of energetic, "up" moods to depressive, "down" moods.
